ogTitle: Thowgla Valley vs Three Bridges: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Thowgla Valley and Three Bridges.
heading: Thowgla Valley vs Three Bridges — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Thowgla Valley, Victoria and Three Bridges, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Thowgla Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Three Bridges (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Thowgla Valley or Three Bridges safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Thowgla Valley has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Three Bridges scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Thowgla Valley scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Three Bridges scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Thowgla Valley or Three Bridges?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Thowgla Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
